cmd:
set -eu
BB=/var/lib/easyenclave/bin/busybox
DATA=/var/lib/easyenclave/data
if [ ! -e /dev/vdc ]; then echo 'mount-data: no /dev/vdc, skipping'; exit 0; fi
$BB mkdir -p "$DATA"
if ! $BB grep -q " $DATA " /proc/mounts; then $BB mount -t ext4 /dev/vdc "$DATA"; fi
echo "mount-data: mounted /dev/vdc on $DATA"
